meta.title: 50 Years After the 1965 War: What Has Changed in India-Pakistan Relations?
meta.description: Stephen Cohen, Shuja Nawaz, and Col. John Gill (Ret.) join Amb. Husain Haqqani to discuss the roots  and legacy of the 1965 India-Pakistan War.
